title: MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform
description: A Cross-Platform Medieval and Roguelike Minecraft experience for low-end PCs!
body:
![MedieCraftTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f3de6300e3aeacd8f61d1bcd9948a7c42043e5.png)

![MedieCraftLite_HeroImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2dbd8e2cde63f77cf2a13497b39c480aaf28363_0.webp)

**This modpack has been created with the aim of rediscovering the game through an ultra-immersive, challenging world full of new things to discover throughout your adventure.**

**Roam the world, traverse biomes and worlds, fight monsters on the prowl, and explore structures and dungeons to make your armor and weapons. Forget boring mining sessions and prepare yourself for an unforgettable experience with your friends.**

**This modpack is very challenging by setting game difficulty to normal or hard. If you want to explore the world and chill, easy difficulty is recommended. Good luck if you want to play in hardcore. ;)** (This version is a bit easier compared to the standard MedieCraft modpack)

**See [original modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite).**
_________________________

- 🐓 ~~**New mobs and mob variants**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🍅 ~~**More plants**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🏛 **Enhanced structures** and new ones
- 🛖 **Themed villages** and **structures** 
- ⛰️ **Beautiful landscapes** with new and **larger biomes** using Terralith and Tectonic
- ⚔️ **Dungeons**, **mobs**, **structures** to build your stuff using battles instead of mining
- 🎑 _**Ultra immersive environment sounds and songs**_ (limited in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🪓 **Realistic trees**
- 🗡 ~~**New tools and weapons**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🏞 **Beautiful** and **immersive resource packs**
- 🔦 **Dynamic Lights**
- 🎙 ~~**Proximity chat** (with voice effects depending on the environment)~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🧟‍♂️ **Ultra realistic mob movements** with Fresh Animations
- 👹 ~~**More monsters**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🌋 ~~**Better Nether**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 👁 ~~**Better End**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- ⚡️ **Hyper fast and ultra optimized**
- 🔥 **Very challenging**

**❌ Not included in this modpack: (see [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) for a Highly detailed experience)**
- 💥 Enhanced particles and effects
- ✨️ Butter smooth GUI
- 🏔️ Distant Horizon and BSL shaders for beautiful effects and world views

# **Compatibility**

❌ MedieCraft

❌ MedieCraft - Lite

❌ MedieCraft - Server

✅ MedieCraft - Cross-Platform

✅ MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform

✅ MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform

✅ MC Bedrock Clients

✅ MC Java Clients (using Fabric, ViaVersion, ViaFabric, CreativeCore and GeckoLib)

# **Key notes**
- **Client side modpack** (necessary to play in solo worlds and in server worlds using [MedieCraft - Server])
- **Low Detailed ModPack** (check [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) if you have a decent dedicated graphics card)
- The mod list is available by clicking on 'versions' and then on the version number you chose to install.

# **System Requirements**
**Minimal System Requirements**

- 2GB allocated to Minecraft

- 4 Cores / 4-8 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 3 3100, Intel Core i5 6400)

- Integrated Graphics

- 8Gb RAM 

- 1,5GB SSD storage


**Recommended System Requirements (w/ shaders & without Distant Horizon mod)**

- 4GB allocated to Minecraft

- 4 Cores / 8 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 5 3400G, Intel Core i5 7400)

- Integrated Graphics

- 16GB RAM

- 1,5GB SSD storage

# **Instructions**

1. Download this modpack with the version you chose or the same version running your server.
2. Go to your Modrinth library and click on 'Play'. Game should start and you are ready to go!

# **Q&A**

- **Why is there a [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) and [MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite-cross-platform) modpack ? What's the difference between the two ?**

[MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) has many client side mods that improve quality of life like [Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui), [Camera Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul), [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular), [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders), [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) and many other mods compared to [MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite-cross-platform) (this one) which doesn't.

- **Is this modpack compatible with [MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server-cross-platform) ?** 

Absolutely, using this modpack you can join your solo worlds as well as servers using the [MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server-cross-platform) modpack on server side.

- **How much RAM should I allocate to this modpack profile ?**

2GB minimum but 4GB is recommended.

- **Can I play this modpack in older versions of Minecraft ?**

Yes, to be able to play in older versions, you have to unlink the modpack at the very bottom of the modpack options. Then change the version of Minecraft and update all mods by clicking on 'update mods'. Start the game and it should launch if all mods are compatible with the selected version of Minecraft.

- **Is this modpack Cross-Platform ?**

Yes, this modpack is Cross-Platform.

- **Can I use this modpack with a server running [MedieCraft - Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server) ?** 

No, you are missing many mods that are mandatory to join a [MedieCraft - Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server). See [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite).



# **Credits**
💙 Huge thanks to Maffhew with his Excalibur resource pack for giving me the idea of creating this resource pack. I honored him by putting his resource pack icon to my modpack ! The resource pack is in this modpack !
